creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Feb 21, 2008 at 10:43:29AM +0200, Serhii Laskavyi wrote:
> RELENG7 gcc with "-O2" breaks libdvdcss
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/119647
> 
> Is it FreeBSD problem or GCC problem?

Most likely a libdvdcss problem.  Compile with highest warnings - does
anything stand out?  If not then its a GCC 4.2.1 problem.
